'''ân-y-sh''' ('''kanayash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:helilift|helilift]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-y-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:helilift|helilift]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-y-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kanayash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinayash|thinayash]] || [[word:jinayash|jinayash]] || [[word:shinayash|shinayash]] || [[word:kinayash|kinayash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunayash|thuthunayash]] || [[word:jujunayash|jujunayash]] || [[word:shushunayash|shushunayash]] || [[word:kukunayash|kukunayash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunayash|thunayash]] || [[word:junayash|junayash]] || [[word:shunayash|shunayash]] || [[word:kunayash|kunayash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunayash|thunayash]] || [[word:junayash|junayash]] || [[word:shunayash|shunayash]] || [[word:kunayash|kunayash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenayash|thenayash]] || [[word:jenayash|jenayash]] || [[word:shenayash|shenayash]] || [[word:kenayash|kenayash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonayash|thothonayash]] || [[word:jojonayash|jojonayash]] || [[word:shoshonayash|shoshonayash]] || [[word:kokonayash|kokonayash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonayash|thonayash]] || [[word:jonayash|jonayash]] || [[word:shonayash|shonayash]] || [[word:konayash|konayash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonayash|thonayash]] || [[word:jonayash|jonayash]] || [[word:shonayash|shonayash]] || [[word:konayash|konayash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnayash|thĂŠnayash]] || [[word:jĂŠnayash|jĂŠnayash]] || [[word:shĂŠnayash|shĂŠnayash]] || [[word:kĂŠnayash|kĂŠnayash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanayash|thathanayash]] || [[word:jajanayash|jajanayash]] || [[word:shashanayash|shashanayash]] || [[word:kakanayash|kakanayash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanayash|thanayash]] || [[word:janayash|janayash]] || [[word:shanayash|shanayash]] || [[word:kanayash|kanayash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanayash|thanayash]] || [[word:janayash|janayash]] || [[word:shanayash|shanayash]] || [[word:kanayash|kanayash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanayash|shanayash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanayash|goshanayash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanayash|gokishanayash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanayashnĂŒ|shanayashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanayashnknĂŒ|goshanayashnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanayashnĂŒ|gokishanayashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanayashĂ«|shanayashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanayashnkshĂ«|goshanayashnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanayashĂ«|gokishanayashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanayashro|shanayashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanayashnkro|goshanayashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanayashro|gokishanayashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanayashmu|shanayashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanayashnkmu|goshanayashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanayashmu|gokishanayashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanayasher|shanayasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanayashnksher|goshanayashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanayasher|gokishanayasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanayashng|shanayashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanayashnkng|goshanayashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanayashng|gokishanayashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanayashya|shanayashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanayashnkya|goshanayashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanayashya|gokishanayashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanayashyam|shanayashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanayashnkyam|goshanayashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanayashyam|gokishanayashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanayashnĂŒshĂ«|shanayashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanayashnknĂŒshĂ«|goshanayashnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanayashnĂŒshĂ«|gokishanayashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanayashnĂŒro|shanayashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanayashnknĂŒro|goshanayashnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanayashnĂŒro|gokishanayashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanayashnĂŒmu|shanayashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanayashnknĂŒmu|goshanayashnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanayashnĂŒmu|gokishanayashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanayashĂ«nĂŒ|shanayashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanayashnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshanayashnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanayashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishanayashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanayashĂ«ro|shanayashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanayashnkshĂ«ro|goshanayashnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanayashĂ«ro|gokishanayashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanayashĂ«mu|shanayashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanayashnkshĂ«mu|goshanayashnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanayashĂ«mu|gokishanayashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanayashronĂŒ|shanayashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanayashnkronĂŒ|goshanayashnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanayashronĂŒ|gokishanayashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanayashroshĂ«|shanayashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanayashnkroshĂ«|goshanayashnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanayashroshĂ«|gokishanayashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanayashromu|shanayashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanayashnkromu|goshanayashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanayashromu|gokishanayashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanayashmunĂŒ|shanayashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanayashnkmunĂŒ|goshanayashnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanayashmunĂŒ|gokishanayashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanayashmushĂ«|shanayashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanayashnkmushĂ«|goshanayashnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanayashmushĂ«|gokishanayashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanayashmuro|shanayashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanayashnkmuro|goshanayashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanayashmuro|gokishanayashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
